projectDescription: A Slack app that automatically sends AI-generated birthday and work-anniversary shoutouts to teammates, with a web dashboard for managing your roster, settings, and billing.
keyFeatures: AI-generated birthday and work-anniversary shoutouts posted automatically in Slack
Member opt-in flow — teammates add their own dates, admins never manage a spreadsheet
Web dashboard at cakeday.io/app for roster management, settings, and billing
Per-workspace scheduling: choose the channel, post time, and timezone
Four pricing tiers (Free, Starter, Growth, Pro) billed by celebrations per year, not roster size
/cakeday slash command for quick access from anywhere in Slack
Mass broadcast invites to onboard the whole workspace at once (Starter+)
Custom AI tone prompts and branded shoutout display name/icon (Pro)
publicApiSurface: /cakeday me — view or update your own birthday and work anniversary
/cakeday invite @user — send a Slack DM invite to add their dates
/cakeday broadcast — mass-DM the workspace to invite opt-ins (admin, Starter+)
/cakeday usage — view annual celebration budget and remaining cap (admin)
/cakeday admins — list current Cake Day admins and celebration channels
cakeday.io/app — authenticated workspace portal (dashboard, roster, settings, billing)
cakeday.io/app/settings — channel, post time, timezone, pause/resume, AI voice, custom GIFs
cakeday.io/app/roster — add, edit, and remove roster members; CSV import
cakeday.io/app/billing — plan, usage, and Stripe subscription management
cakeday.io/pricing — plan comparison and checkout entry
